introSection: High Speed Thrill Coaster was a steel kiddie roller coaster located at Knoebels Amusement Resort in Elysburg, Pennsylvania, USA. It was located on the spot now occupied by Kozmo's Kurves, which reuses the station of High Speed Thrill Coaster. The ride opened in the 1955 season alongside Satellite.

sections.title: Design
sections.content: The ride had an oval layout.

fullText:
High Speed Thrill Coaster was a steel kiddie roller coaster located at Knoebels Amusement Resort in Elysburg, Pennsylvania, USA. It was located on the spot now occupied by Kozmo's Kurves, which reuses the station of High Speed Thrill Coaster. The ride opened in the 1955 season alongside Satellite.

The ride had an oval layout.

White track and supports.
